channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Tuesday briefing: ‘An historic rupture’ as the Middle East crisis spreads - The Guardian
item.description:
1. Tuesday briefing: ‘An historic rupture’ as the Middle East crisis spreads  The Guardian
  2. What we know about the widening US war with Iran  CNN
  3. Watch: The third day of the US-Israeli war with Iran  BBC
  4. The escalating Mideast conflict — in maps  Financial Times
  5. The War Room newsletter: A widening war in the Middle East  The Economist

item.title: How Trump assassination attempts played into his decision to attack Iran - The Washington Post
item.description:
1. How Trump assassination attempts played into his decision to attack Iran  The Washington Post
  2. Has the US ever assassinated a world leader before?  CNN
  3. Ali Khamenei hoped his legacy might last for ever  The Economist
  4. Intelligence assessment warns of Iranian attacks on US following Khamenei's death  Reuters
  5. Can Trump Legally Kill Iran’s Leader?  The New York Times

item.title: Trump says 'sad to see' US-UK relationship deteriorate over Iran strikes - Reuters
item.description:
1. Trump says 'sad to see' US-UK relationship deteriorate over Iran strikes  Reuters
  2. Starmer at odds with Trump in biggest disagreement yet  BBC
  3. Trump rebukes Starmer over UK refusal to back strikes on Iran  The Guardian
  4. Keir Starmer has his ‘Love Actually’ moment and stands up to Donald Trump  Financial Times
  5. Summary of the UK Government legal position: The legality of defensive action in respect of Iranian regional attacks  GOV.UK

item.title: What the Iran war means for the US-China balance - Lowy Institute
item.description:
1. What the Iran war means for the US-China balance  Lowy Institute
  2. U.S. Attacks on Iran Test Fragile Truce With China  The New York Times
  3. Attack on Iran could buoy Trump in talks with China's Xi  Reuters
  4. Beijing Doesn’t Think Like Washington—and the Iran Conflict Shows Why  Carnegie Endowment for International Peace
  5. China could face ‘real problems’ within two months if Strait of Hormuz crisis drags on, expert warns  Fox Business

item.title: U.S. evacuates diplomats, shuts down some embassies as war enters fourth day - NPR
item.description:
1. U.S. evacuates diplomats, shuts down some embassies as war enters fourth day  NPR
  2. US orders departure of non-emergency government personnel in 6 countries across the region  CNN
  3. Americans in Middle East should leave now, State Department says  USA Today
  4. US urges citizens to immediately leave over a dozen Middle East countries  Al Jazeera
  5. State Department urges Americans across Mideast to depart as strikes continue  NBC News

item.title: Iran war live updates: Israel bolsters forces in southern Lebanon, drones hit U.S. embassy in Riyadh as oil rises further; dollar strengthens - CNBC
item.description:
1. Iran war live updates: Israel bolsters forces in southern Lebanon, drones hit U.S. embassy in Riyadh as oil rises further; dollar strengthens  CNBC
  2. The aftermath of ongoing Israeli and US strikes on Iran’s capital, Tehran  Al Jazeera
  3. How the Bombing of Iran Is Affecting Lebanon, Kuwait and Other Countries  The New York Times
  4. Dispatch from Tehran: Nowhere feels safe from attack  NBC News
  5. Everything we know on day 4 of the US and Israel’s war with Iran  CNN

item.title: Iran targets U.S. allies, hits American Embassy in Riyadh - Axios
item.description:
1. Iran targets U.S. allies, hits American Embassy in Riyadh  Axios
  2. Iran live news: US embassy in Riyadh hit; Israel seizes land in Lebanon  Al Jazeera

  4. Live updates: Strikes escalate across the Middle East as Iran attacks US Embassy in Saudi Arabia  AP News
  5. US embassy in Riyadh hit by Iranian drones as Israeli troops enter southern Lebanon  The Guardian

item.title: An Emboldened Israel Is Seizing Opportunities to Remake Region - The New York Times
item.description:
1. An Emboldened Israel Is Seizing Opportunities to Remake Region  The New York Times
  2. ANALYSIS | A diminished Iran would redraw the Mideast | CBC News  CBC
  3. Let us prepare for a new reality  Arab News PK
  4. What prospects for a new Iran?  Le Monde diplomatique - English edition
  5. The world needs this to be a turning point with Iran  The Jerusalem Post

item.title: Military officials question fortifications at site where U.S. troops were killed in Iranian strike - CBS News
item.description:
1. Military officials question fortifications at site where U.S. troops were killed in Iranian strike  CBS News
  2. U.S. Military Death Toll in Iran War Rises to 6  The New York Times

  4. U.S. death toll in Iran war rises to 6 as Trump says campaign could last 5 weeks  CBS News
  5. Six Troops Killed in Kuwait in Iran Drone Attack  WSJ

item.title: France to boost nuclear arsenal and extend deterrence to European allies - BBC
item.description:
1. France to boost nuclear arsenal and extend deterrence to European allies  BBC

  3. France Floats Nuclear Deployment Across Europe  WSJ
  4. France to increase nuclear arsenal and European weapons cooperation, Macron says  The Guardian
  5. Macron says France will allow temporary deployment of nuclear-armed jets to allied nations  NBC News

item.title: Airlines are being squeezed into this sliver of sky to avoid closed airspace - Business Insider
item.description:
1. Airlines are being squeezed into this sliver of sky to avoid closed airspace  Business Insider
  2. The hole in the sky: How Middle East airspace closures are reshaping global aviation  CNN
  3. Air travel chaos intensifies as airports remain closed, flights canceled amid Iran war  CBS News
  4. What to do if your flight is cancelled due to the US-Israel war on Iran  The Guardian
  5. Airline ticket prices soar on Asia-Europe routes after Gulf airport closures  Reuters

item.title: Qatar Says It Shot Down Two Iranian Bombers - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Qatar Says It Shot Down Two Iranian Bombers  The New York Times
  2. Qatar downs Iran jets as Tehran targets oil and gas in spiralling Gulf crisis  France 24

  4. Iran Claims Largest US Radar In Gulf Destroyed: All About Billion Dollar Machine  NDTV
  5. Qatar says its air force downed 2 Iranian Russian-made bombers  The Times of Israel

item.title: Pakistan Strikes Bagram Air Base, Satellite Images Show - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Pakistan Strikes Bagram Air Base, Satellite Images Show  The New York Times

  4. Afghanistan fires at Pakistani jets over Kabul as conflict intensifies  NBC News
  5. Pakistan and Afghanistan Are Fighting, Too  Foreign Policy

item.title: World reacts as U.S.-Israeli attacks on Iran sprawl into regional war - PBS
item.description:
1. World reacts as U.S.-Israeli attacks on Iran sprawl into regional war  PBS

  3. Iran strikes ‘squandered a chance for diplomacy’: Guterres  UN News
  4. How the world has reacted to US and Israeli strikes on Iran  BBC
  5. World hurries to respond to rapidly changing war around Iran  AP News

item.title: Live updates: Israel hits Beirut and Tehran as Trump warns Iran of escalated strikes - CNN
item.description:
1. Live updates: Israel hits Beirut and Tehran as Trump warns Iran of escalated strikes  CNN
  2. Trump won’t rule out sending US troops into Iran ‘if necessary’— tells Post war is progressing ‘way ahead of schedule’  New York Post
  3. Trump Says Iran War Could Last Weeks and Gives Competing Visions of New Regime  The New York Times
  4. I Said Too Late For Talks': Trump Says Iran Military, Leadership "Gone"  NDTV
  5. Donald Trump says he will do ‘whatever it takes’ to contain Iran  Financial Times

item.title: Live updates: U.S.-Israeli war with Iran spreads, as Iran's neighbors warn strikes won't "go unanswered" - CBS News
item.description:
1. Live updates: U.S.-Israeli war with Iran spreads, as Iran's neighbors warn strikes won't "go unanswered"  CBS News
  2. Israeli troops intensify push in southern Lebanon, in escalation of campaign against Hezbollah  CNN
  3. Despite Its Weakness, Hezbollah Plunges Lebanon Back Into War  The New York Times
  4. Israel Sends Troops Into Southern Lebanon as Hezbollah Says It Is Ready for Open War  U.S. News & World Report
  5. Israeli military deploys additional forces to southern Lebanon  Reuters
